hero.h1: If you can't reach a million people with 0€ ad spend, your branding sucks.
hero.lead: We will 10x your social presence or work for free until it’s done.

statement.h2: Content only you can post because it's built around your people.

testimonials.quote: Cinder & Bloom understands our audience and voice, and delivers results
testimonials.name: Mira Lindqvist

testimonials.quote: We reached a huge audience fast, with total peace of mind
testimonials.name: Tobias Renner

decks.title: Loom House built a social presence that carries the spirit of a bold brand.

cards.caption: Founder interview clip: how Loom House rebuilt its voice from the ground up and what changed in the first ninety days.
Behind the loom: a day in the studio, cut vertical and captioned for the feed. No ad spend, all organic reach.
The craft series episode on natural dyes — the most-saved post Loom House has ever published.

decks.title: Second Circle put their people at the center and went viral.

cards.caption: The spring collection route wrapped, but the team is back in autumn — bring anything clean, useful and in good shape.
Thanks for the question. Bullying is, sadly, something Roni knows well — he works the bookshelf at our north-side Second Circle.
Niina wants your take: did this donation arrive as a robe or a costume? Odd uniforms show up in our donation bags all the time.

decks.title: New Current builds the bond between journalist and reader through social journalism that stands out.

cards.caption: Why is everyone talking about a city nobody really knows? Our reporter digs into why it behaves less like a city and more like a company.
What did the cost-cutting drive actually achieve, and what really happened behind the scenes? Our correspondent explains.
Did the movement that swept social actually change how people are treated? A professor of acting arts on what shifted over ten years.

decks.title: Roadkind turns roadside assistance into scroll-stopping POV content.

cards.caption: While swapping a dead battery, the crew found a surprise squirrel nest in the engine bay. Roadkind helps 24/7.
Should licences be revoked past forty-five? Our MD disagrees, and breaks down how driving habits really differ by age.
A customer's EV refused to start and only threw warning lights. Roadkind helps 24/7 — membership from 11€ a month.

decks.title: Motive Lab, the country's largest gym brand: "This is how social media should be done"

cards.caption: You can shape the Motive Lab playlist by sending requests straight to our front desk — built to keep the gym floor energised.
Before Motive Lab, Heikki played pro hockey and Johanna ran a family gym. Then they pooled it all and started over.
Heikki on where Motive Lab found its first fifty thousand in funding — and what they did with it.

items.title: Training
items.sub: We'll help your team understand social
items.body: If your in-house media team struggles with organic results, we can help you think like us, blueprint your content strategy, and follow up at regular intervals to ensure you stay on track.

items.title: Ads for social
items.sub: (and why your ad creatives benefit more from clarity than novelty)
items.body: Organic is where you build interest. Ads layer on top of that, taking your best-performing faces, locations, hooks, and topics and presenting your offer in a clear, feed-native way.

items.title: Organic content
items.sub: Let's build an engaged audience for your brand.
items.body: A strong organic presence brings you closer to your customers at scale. We'll help you build one that's visually polished and feels authentic to you.

items.text: Cinder & Bloom has been with us through critical moments on New Current's journey, from our founding campaign to our first-year membership drive. Together we found our own voice on social in a style that suits a startup: we tested, experimented, and doubled down on what works. We made many viral hits together, and the results speak for themselves.
items.name: Sofia Aaltonen

items.text: Cinder & Bloom believed from day one that we could turn even our critics into supporters through short-form video, and that's exactly what happened. Over the campaign the harshest voices faded and genuine support grew in their place. They work at the relentless pace a high-stakes campaign demands, delivering in hours what would take others days.
items.name: Henrik Salmi

items.text: They have a knack for finding the topics, people, and angles that bring out the different dimensions of what we do in an authentic, distinctive voice. I'd almost say Cinder & Bloom helped us find our identity. And the social audience is loving it: our visibility is on a completely different level than before the partnership.
items.name: Elina Korhonen

items.text: Results speak for themselves. We reached a massive audience and broke into traditional media's awareness in just a few months. The best part of the collaboration is peace of mind: we can trust their expertise. They know how to reach a wide audience with our messages.
items.name: Marcus Virtanen

items.text: Cinder & Bloom has succeeded in bringing the expertise at the core of our work to a wide audience, and the results have followed. We especially value how they understand our members and the way Motive Lab speaks. They serve our audience alongside us. This is how social media should be done.
items.name: Aino Laine

about.h2: Does your brand have self-esteem issues?
about.body: Companies think their work, vision and people are not interesting. That they need expensive brand campaigns to look cool. We believe it's lying, stupid and a waste of money.
